cards.example: stall, kiosk; telephone booth, telephone compartment

cards.vi: be born [được] sinh ra
cards.example: give birth;endure; carry; support; suffer; produce

cards.example: jump; leap; function as a border, delimit;tie, fasten; wrap, cover, bandage; restrain; firmly unite; obligate; fasten together the pages of a book and place them in a cover; stick together, cohere; restrict, be tight
cards.synonyms: leap, spring, hurdle, conjoin, jump, adjoin, skirt, sure, spring, clear, border, assured, forced, guaranteed, jump, fringe, obliged, certain, destined, leap, vault, bounce, touch, compelled, obligated, constrained, bounce, hop, inevitable, hop, unavoidable, required, abut

cards.vi: khoảnh khắc quẫn trí

cards.synonyms: idea, breakthrough, innovation, inspiration, devise, think, suggest

cards.vi: cái phanh, cái hăm
cards.example: device which is used to slow or stop a vehicle; thicket; type of fern; carriage

cards.vi: cái cặp (để giấy tờ, tài liệu)

cards.synonyms: suitcase, case

cards.vi: mở rộng; rộng ra
cards.example: make wider; be made wider

cards.vi: sách mỏng
cards.example: pamphlet, leaflet
cards.synonyms: catalog, leaflet, pamphlet, booklet
